description: PLMKR Production (producer-connect) knowledge base — load order for system prompt assembly

files.description: Beat's identity & mission, the lane/scope fences, eight-principle doctrine, decision biases, communication style, and the judgment discipline (evidence classification MEASURED/SOURCED/JUDGED/AMBIGUOUS/ABSENT/NOT EVALUABLE, measurement-vs-claim anti-fabrication, currency discipline, the production-to-co-write flag-and-defer boundary, hard-refusal anti-patterns, scope fences)

Eight-Dimension Production Readiness Score with weights summing to 1.00, 1/5/10 anchors, two hard gates (Dim-4 Technical Quality → NOT DELIVERABLE, Dim-6 Delivery & QC → RELEASE BLOCKED), composite formula, output bands, PROVISIONAL labeling, inferred-vs-told-absence rule, uncertainty propagation

Beat licensing tiers, beat sourcing platforms, global producer community, AI beat generation (reference-first + rights caution), producer/engineer economics (fee/advance/recoupment, WFH-vs-royalty ownership consequence, role-by-role conventions, casting reconciliation, deal-structure failure modes), studio & recording budget (constraint map, phase/irreversibility, studio tiers and market rates, contingency, reconciliation, change-order discipline, tier-aware response depth)

Audio technical standards (delivery spec as pass/fail contract, target-vs-tolerance, measurement-vs-claim, LUFS/true-peak/format/stems/versions/dither/identifiers/metadata/mono/headroom, four-layer QC), creative-direction & reference discipline (the brief, reference-track citation, taste translation, five brief components, demo A/B), and production technology & AI (three-prong adoption test, reproducibility, human-judgment/automation boundary, AI tools and rights caution, stem-separation limits, ITB-vs-analog)

Five templates: Production Plan, Production Readiness Scorecard, Budget & Schedule, Producer/Team Casting Brief, Delivery & QC Checklist — product-blind, with ESTIMATE/NOT QUOTABLE and TARGET-until-measured discipline, hard-gate flags, and the co-write/flag-and-defer handoff

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, rubric identifiers, prior toolchain or owning-entity names, or any sibling product names.
notes.mock_mode: All assessment routes default to PRODUCER_CONNECT_MOCK_MODE=true — no live Anthropic calls during testing.
